steps.title: Map the relationship between the two sentences
steps.content: Sentence 1: selenium was isolated in 1817, the same year scientists discovered it — isolation was immediate. Sentence 2: molybdenum's isolation took longer, happening three years after discovery. The two timelines are opposed.

steps.title: Pick the transition that signals opposition
steps.content: We need a transition that flags a contrast between "isolated the same year" and "isolated three years after discovery."

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'By contrast,': directly signals opposition between the two isolation timelines. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Thus,': signals consequence — selenium's quick isolation is not a cause of molybdenum's slow isolation. Misread of the logical link. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Similarly,': signals likeness — same-year and three-years-later are opposites, not parallels. ✗
  • Choice D — 'For instance,': signals exemplification — molybdenum is not an example of selenium's quick isolation; it is the opposite case. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
